name: Perplexity Search
description: Requires python3, and AISA_API_KEY. Uses the supplied AISA_API_KEY to send requests to https://api.aisa.one. Native-first ClawHub plugin for `perplexity-search`. Ships the packaged AIsa skill with an `openclaw.plugin.json` manifest and a Claude-compatible bundle fallback. Perplexity Sonar search and answer generation through AIsa. Use when the task is specifically to call Perplexity Sonar, Sonar Pro, Sonar Reasoning Pro, or Sonar Deep Research for citation-backed web answers, analytical reasoning, or long-form research reports.

commands.name: perplexity-search
commands.description: Perplexity Sonar search and answer generation through AIsa. Use when the task is specifically to call Perplexity Sonar, Sonar Pro, Sonar Reasoning Pro, or Sonar Deep Research for citation-backed web answers, analytical reasoning, or long-form research reports.

AISA_API_KEY.title: Aisa Api Key
AISA_API_KEY.description: Provide AISA_API_KEY for the packaged AIsa skill runtime.

providerAuthChoices.choiceHint: Used only to authorize requests to the AIsa API service.
providerAuthChoices.cliDescription: AISA_API_KEY used by the packaged skill runtime.
